headline: Why Is Rollins (ROL) Down 5.3% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Rollins (ROL) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: 2 Profitable Stocks on Our Watchlist and 1 We Question
summary: Even if a company is profitable, it doesn’t always mean it’s a great investment. Some struggle to maintain growth, face looming threats, or fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their future potential.
